channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: Our prediction for how SCOTUS will rule on birthright citizenship
item.description: "Join us as we break down our expert prediction for the upcoming SCOTUS ruling on birthright citizenship. For a deeper dive into the issue, read the full article here: https://www.economist.com/united-states/2026/03/31/our-prediction-for-how-scotus-will-rule-on-birthright-citizenship and tune in to our video for analysis and insights on what this ruling could mean for the future of US citizenship."
